market_pulse: Weekend momentum high across Wynn (Calvin Harris, Diplo, Sullivan King) and Caesars (Tiësto, Chris Lake) properties; LIV maintains momentum with resident artists and strong social engagement during Memorial Day period.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily using short-form trending audio clips and dance challenges in TikTok stories; LIV minimal presence in this trend cycle.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 TikTok dance challenges using EDM trending audio; boost via promoter partnerships.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan and OMNIA leveraging creator takeovers for event announcements; LIV not detected in this space this cycle.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 2-3 high-engagement Vegas creators for live Stories from LIV Beach/Nightclub on Memorial Day weekend.

content_gaps.description: Encore Beach Club using countdown posts aggressively for weekend lineups (Calvin Harris, Diplo); LIV could amplify visual countdowns.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post hourly countdown grids on Stories for major LIV events (Discolines Fri 5/22, David Guetta Sat 5/23, John Summit Sun 5/24).
